Label: N/A
Level: does not include a section on user interface design
Issue: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface with intuitive navigation, consistent layout, and responsive design for various devices.
does not specify the type of home computer required for the DH home web server
Correction: The DH home web server shall be hosted on a home computer running at least Windows 10, macOS 10.15, or a Linux distribution with kernel version 5.4 or higher.

Issue: does not specify the type of contact sensors and alarms
Correction: The DigitalHome security system shall use magnetic contact sensors and piezoelectric sound alarms.

Issue: does not specify the time required for system recovery
Correction: The system recovery mechanism shall restore system data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Issue: does not include safety measures of children or disabled individuals
Correction: The system shall provide child safety locks and alerts for appliances to prevent accidental activation.

Issue: does not specify the encryption algorithm to be used
Correction: The DigitalHome web system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Issue: does not detail  user privacy and data ownership.
Correction: Users shall retain ownership of their data, and the system shall provide options to export or delete their data upon request.
